title: Bastelgruppen Client Optimized
description: A vanilla like client to play with your friends. Focusing on performance. (An optimized version of the Basic Bastelgruppen client)
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/80c57133746f9f765a7368ce5e78cbd131c19fc0.png)

A **vanilla like** client to play with your friends!

_It is an optimized version of the basic Bastelgruppen Client for weaker PCs, so that all the friends can play together :D_

The pack focuses on **quality of life features and performance optimization**
It is perfect if you are looking for a vanilla playthrough with an **enhanced optimization** and **no additional gameplay-content**.

If your computer can handel a bit more try [Bastelgruppen Client](https://modrinth.com/modpack/bastelgruppen-client)

## Mods
<details>
<summary>Mods Version 1.3.0 (Minecraft 1.21.10)</summary>

### Quality of Life
- Better Mount HUD
- Better Statistics Screen
- Boat Item View
- Cherished Worlds
- Client Sort
- Cubes Without Borders
- Detail Armor Bar Reconstruced
- Essential Mod
- Fast Trading
- Freecam
- GUI Followers
- Held Item Info
- Horse Statistics
- Lighty
- Mod Menu
- Monsters in the Closet
- Numeral Ping
- Scribble
- Stack to Nearby Chests
- Trade Cycling
- World Play Time

### Visual Improvements
- AppleSkin
- YDM's Weapon Master
  
### Performance Improvments
- BadOptimizations
- Chunky
- Concurrent Chunk Management Engine (Fabric)
- Dynamic FPS
- Entity Culling
- Faster IP Ping
- ImmediatelyFast
- Krypton
- Lithium
- More Culling
- Packet Fixer
- ScalableLux
- Sodium

</details>
